title: Analytics - Find My Device Opened
scenario: Firebase analytics logs default elements when user opens Find My Device screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected Android device.
2. From the Home screen, navigate to the Device Settings screen for the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Locate and tap on the "Find My Device" option from the Device Settings menu.
4. Observe the "Find My Device" screen that loads.
expected: The "Find My Device" screen displays correctly with all default elements: a graph showing device location history, events from the last 30 minutes, event count broken down by country and gender, events per session, and app metadata (app version, app build, app environment). The Firebase analytics event is properly logged when the screen is opened.
